text:
いやー、どうだったかな？
熱い訓練メニューだったでしょ？

しっかし、それをきっちり
やりとげるとは……あなたも
ずいぶん上達してきたよねえ。

これ以上は厳しいかもって思ってたけど
また別のすっごいメニューを
用意しなきゃ失礼かなー？

よーく考えて準備しておくから
また
So? How was it? Exciting stuff, right?

You hardly looked like you broke a sweat,
though. You and that bow of yours have
definitely come a long way.

I thought I'd really outdone myself last time,
but I wouldn't want to be rude and deny you
more training, you know?

I'll whip up another extra special regimen for
you, so make sure you come on by again.
